commands.command: vp create vite:application --no-interactive # create vite app with default values

commands: test ! -f vite-plus-application/.github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml # default create should not add Copilot setup workflow

commands.command: vp create vite:application --no-interactive --directory claude-app --agent claude # create vite app with non-Copilot agent

commands: test ! -f claude-app/.github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml # non-Copilot agent should not add Copilot setup workflow

commands.command: vp create vite:application --no-interactive --directory no-agent-app --no-agent # create vite app without agent setup

commands: test ! -f no-agent-app/.github/workflows/copilot-setup-steps.yml # --no-agent should not add Copilot setup workflow

commands.command: vp create vite:application --no-interactive --directory copilot-app --agent copilot # create vite app with Copilot agent setup
vp create vite:application --no-interactive --directory my-react-ts -- --template react-ts # create vite app with react-ts template
